name: mece
description: Evaluations for mece skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user wants structured decomposition

prompts.input: 帮我用 MECE 把这个问题拆解一下
不重不漏地分析一下用户流失的原因
I need a mutually exclusive breakdown of our revenue streams
帮我做个结构化分析，把所有可能的原因分类

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for other thinking tools or non-thinking requests

prompts.input: 用第一性原理分析这个问题
Write unit tests for the auth module
prompts.reason: Code task, should trigger coding skills

prompts.input: 这个 bug 为什么反复出现？
prompts.reason: Root cause analysis, should trigger five-whys
